who: HR managers in mid-sized companies using Workday, managing 100-500 employees
offer: For HR managers in mid-sized companies using Workday, processing 100-500 employees, inaccurate forecasting causes retention issues. We provide a workforce analytics dashboard instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated HRIS reports.
problem: Inability to accurately forecast headcount and manage compensation budgets, leading to retention issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about HR workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool discussions
try_it: Let users try headcount forecasting tool and budget modeling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
